name: RNAseq_edger_limma_de
description: Bulk RNA-seq differential expression via edgeR (QL-F) or limma-voom on a count matrix + sample metadata — the two standard DE frameworks alongside DESeq2 (run_deseq2_analysis). method='edger' (good for small replicate counts) or 'limma' (large n / complex designs). Returns DEG counts at FDR-only, FDR+|logFC|, and strict (FDR+|logFC|+expression) filters, optional per-gene logFC/FDR, and the full ranked table on disk. Requires Rscript with Bioconductor edgeR + limma.

counts_file.description: Path to counts CSV (genes x samples; first column = gene IDs)

metadata_file.description: Path to sample metadata CSV (one row per sample)

design.description: Design formula, e.g. '~ condition' or '~ batch + condition' (default '~ condition')

lfc_threshold.description: abs(logFC) threshold for the sig sets (default 0.5)

expr_threshold.description: Expression threshold (logCPM/AveExpr) for the strict set (default 0)

exclude_samples.description: Comma-separated sample IDs to drop before analysis

report_genes.description: Comma-separated gene IDs to report individual logFC/FDR for
